mapper.select: select * from notification where user_id = #{userId} order by create_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into notification(user_id, title, content, type, is_read, create_time) values(#{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{type}, #{isRead}, #{createTime})
mapper.update: update notification set is_read = 1 where notification_id = #{notificationId} and user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: select count(*) from notification where notification_id = #{templateId} or title = (select title from notification where notification_id = #{templateId})
select count(*) from notification where is_read = 1 and (notification_id = #{templateId} or title = (select title from notification where notification_id = #{templateId}))
